message:
fix: change BuiltProperly check from error to warning

The check for properly signed binaries was blocking execution with os.Exit(1).
This caused problems with hooks that call gt commands.

Change to warning-only so the binary still runs, just with a warning message.
This allows development with go build while still reminding to use make build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
